chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Acquittal Appeal No. 451 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For orders as to non-prosecution at A (Notice issued for 14.04.2023) 14.04.2023: None present Inspector Noor Alam, P.S. Shahrah-e-Faisal.-.-.-.-.-. This case was filed on 16.06.2021.Since that date nobody has appeared in this case. SHO P.S. Shahrah-e-Faisal has reported that the Appellant has been served, yet no one has effected appearance. It appears that the purpose for which this appeal was filed has been fulfilled. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Amjad PS
